rationale: Last 2 MEDIUM bugs fixed (faction defaults 0→20, minigame test staleness). New gameplay feature: MerlinWhisperSystem adds cryptic Merlin hints between cards, triggered by hidden state (karma, tension, factions, trust tier, biome). 19 whispers, trust-gated, no repeats. Adds quirky & mysterious personality.
next_cycle_plan: Wire MerlinWhisperSystem into merlin_game_controller.gd card flow. Then playtest core loop (TEST-PLAYTEST-1) or bible audit.
